message:
chore: regenerate conformance / CVE-arena / release fixtures

Refresh after rebuilding tests with the bd-bounded-io commit. None of
these are substantive content changes — each report's pass/fail
verdicts and structural counts are stable — but several surfaces are
treated as golden artifacts and pin per-run digests, so a fresh run
produces drift that blocks the next CI gate unless committed.

What actually changed:

* tests/conformance/*.v1.json — only the generated_at timestamp
  bumped (closure_sweep_report, conformance_coverage_snapshot,
  cross_report_consistency, fixture_pipeline,
  fuzz_harness_architecture, fuzz_membrane_validation,
  fuzz_phase1_targets, fuzz_phase2_targets,
  perf_regression_prevention, reverse_round_contracts,
  stub_census, symbol_tiers_roadmap,
  symbol_universe_normalization). Counts and findings are
  byte-stable.

* tests/conformance/alien_cs_e2e_report.v1.json +
  alien_cs_e2e_trace.v1.jsonl — refreshed end-to-end trace with new
  generated_at; trace events shift only in nondeterministic
  positional ordering of identical evidence rows.

* tests/cve_arena/results/<bead>/artifact_index.json — sha256s of
  target/conformance/*.{report.json,log.jsonl} and the matching
  trace.jsonl rebound to the freshly produced files; same kinds,
  same paths, same artifact set.

* tests/cve_arena/results/<bead>/{strict,hardened}/<scenario>/
  stderr.txt — cargo's compile-output stderr was captured under a
  different CARGO_TARGET_DIR (frankenlibc-cod-libc → -fresh) on
  this run; the warning bodies and "Finished test profile" lines
  differ only by build-host path strings.

* tests/cve_arena/results/<bead>/trace.jsonl +
  bd-18qq.4/uaf_adversarial_detection.v1.json — UAF/temporal traces
  are address-keyed; nondeterministic mmap addresses produce a full
  re-emit even though every event matches its prior decision_path
  and healing_action verbatim. Line counts identical
  (1000 strict + 1000 hardened where applicable).

* tests/cve_arena/results/{corpus_normalization,
  format_string_validation, hardened_assertions,
  heap_overflow_validation, integer_overflow_validation,
  paired_mode_evidence, uaf_validation}.v1.json — generated_at
  bump only.

* tests/runtime_math/{admission_gate_report,
  controller_ablation_report, controller_manifest}.v1.json —
  generated_at bump plus an unchanged-content sha refresh on the
  controller manifest.

* tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json — new sha256s and
  size_bytes deltas (a few hundred bytes) reflecting fresh dossier
  artifacts; verdict is still PASS, every entry remains schema_valid
  with empty findings.
